title: Paradoc's Analog Clock
body:
Ever wanted the classic Analog Clock to be available in Minecraft! Well, this pack adds a 12 hour analog clock to MC, with working hour and minute hands!

The background features a faint sun/moon so that the clock retains its original usage as a way to tell day/night. The sun and moon change at 6:00am/pm. Midday and Midnight are at 12:00pm/am.

Enjoy watching your time tick away with Paradoc's Analog Clock!
